title: Naive Bayes Text Classification Process
description: A flowchart illustrating how a Naive Bayes classifier processes text to predict a category or class label.
relationships: The Input Text Document is sent to Preprocessing
Preprocessing outputs cleaned tokens to Feature Extraction
Feature Extraction creates a word frequency vector for the Apply Naive Bayes Formula step
The Naive Bayes Formula calculates probabilities for each possible Class
The Class with the highest probability is selected as the Predicted Class Label
